case_title: TINA HUANG PHD VS. RACHELLE DENOS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,834.42 FILED BY HUANG PHD, TINA AS TO DEFENDANT DENOS, RACHELLE (SHELLY) MEAS, RATTANA (TIA) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT DENOS, RACHELLE (SHELLY)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY DENOS, RACHELLE (SHELLY)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. DEFENDANT RACHELLE DENOS PRESENT IN COURT. CO-DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT/NOT SERVED. PLAINTIFF VERBALLY STIPULATES TO JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-
DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF REGARDING HER CHANGE OF ADDRESS TO 3435 SALSBURG WAY, VICTORIA BC V8P3K7.
PER JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE'S INSTRUCTIONS: PLTFF'S LETTER & FOLDER TO RM. 506, FOR HIS DECISION EARLY NEXT WEEK.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED MAR-26-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DENOS, RACHELLE (SHELLY)
SHERIFF'S DECLARATION: DILIGENCE...
ORDER DEFT'S CONTC REQUEST "GRANTED".
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO RATTANA MEAS BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-21-2010 AT 6:30PM.
ORDER (WORKSHEET) RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO DEFENDANT RACHELLE DENOS.
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED & FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG PHD, TINA
PLTFF'S LETTER, ADDRESSED TO JUDGE PRO TEM TEM LAVINE, RECEIVED VIA MAIL.
ORDER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR RE-CONSIDERATION "DENIED".
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-21-2010 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG PHD, TINA
RECEIVED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS THROUGH THE MAIL. PLAINTIFF WILL APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. EXHIBITS WERE PLACED IN THE DOCKET.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG PHD, TINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DENOS, RACHELLE (SHELLY) $422.81 PRINCIPAL, $108.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $530.81, SECURITY DEPOSIT MINUS UTILITY OFFSETS REMAINDING $100.00 LATE FEE. LIABILITY AGAINST DEFENDANT RACHELLE DENOS ONLY. CO-DEFENDANT DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

ORDER, OTHER: PLTFF'S LETTER HAS BEEN REVIEWED & TREATED AS A REQUEST FOR RE-CONSIDERATION OF THE AMOUNT ADJUDGED. THIS REQUEST IS DENIED. THE AMOUNT ORDERED TO PLTFF BASED ON ACCOUNT OF PLTFF'S SUBMISSIONS, AS WELL AS DEFT'S EVIDENCE.
